overview: This step fixes spaces around target in-line codes within the text units of a given document. Spaces are either inserted or removed from the target segments so that the spacing around each in-line code in the source is matched. If there is a mismatched number of in-line codes between the source and the target, the un-matched in-line codes are skipped and the remainder of the text unit is processed. Takes filter events and sends filter events.
processingNotes: Spaces are inserted or removed from target segments to match the spacing around each in-line code in the source.
When there is a mismatched number of in-line codes between source and target, un-matched in-line codes are skipped and the remainder of the text unit is still processed.
